name: Italian Ice
recipeInstructions:
1. Put your lemon juice and sugar in the blender container.
2. Blend until sugar is dissolved. Do not wait until after adding ice to dissolve completely.
3. Add ice cubes one at a time while blending until the mixture turns into a slush and cannot be blended anymore. You may need to stop, stir, or add more ice several times.
4. Adjust the taste with more sugar or lemon juice as desired. Avoid using lemon concentrate as it does not yield the same flavor.
5. Pour the mixture into individual freezer containers and place in the freezer for at least four hours before serving.
